race.comment: Open race to close out the card. I DROVE ALL NIGHT (8) has been right there at the past few outings including placing over this track and trip two back. Well placed in this line-up and gets his chance to break the maiden status. IT'S OK (9) just found one better over this trip at the latest effort and must be respected out of the Lees barn. Should be right there when the judge calls a halt. JOSEPHINE OF TUFFY (11) has gotten better with each career outing and looks to be working up to a victory. Top-three conveyance. BON ICHI (3) hasn't been too far away of late and may earn another cheque. WAVES OF EMOCEAN (5) best of the rest.
